About me text: Hello, I am Komeil Yeganeh, I entered the world of web design and programming in 2019. I started with html and css and worked for a year. I entered the world of server side in 2020 and worked with php and laravel. eventually I found my way back to the front end world. My whole focus is on this area. I am interested in technologies in your field
در این شرکت به مدت 8 ماه مربی دوره های آ: In this company, I was an mentor of front end and PHP training courses for 8 months.
به مدت 4 ماه به عنوان توسعه دهنده فرانت: I worked as a front end developer for 4 months, of which 1 month was an internship.
